infographic_metric_arithmetic: The image shows a multi-section infographic with labeled metric cards and printed values.

sum_named_metrics: What is the sum of the values for {target_labels}?
Add the printed values for {target_labels}. What is the total?
What total do you get from the metric cards labeled {target_labels}?
Compute the sum of the named values {target_labels}.
Using the cards labeled {target_labels}, what is the combined value?
section_extrema_arithmetic: What is the {extrema_operation} of the {target_extremum_a} value in section {target_section_a} and the {target_extremum_b} value in section {target_section_b}?
Find the {target_extremum_a} value in section {target_section_a} and the {target_extremum_b} value in section {target_section_b}. What is their {extrema_operation}?

Using section {target_section_a} and section {target_section_b}, compute the {extrema_operation} of the {target_extremum_a} value in {target_section_a} and the {target_extremum_b} value in {target_section_b}.
Look up the {target_extremum_a} metric in section {target_section_a} and the {target_extremum_b} metric in section {target_section_b}. What is their {extrema_operation}?
What integer do you get from the {extrema_operation} of the {target_extremum_a} value in {target_section_a} and the {target_extremum_b} value in {target_section_b}?
section_total_extrema_difference: What is the difference between the highest section total and the lowest section total?
Sum each section, then subtract the lowest section total from the highest section total.
Find the section with the largest total and the section with the smallest total. What is their difference?
After totaling every section, what is highest total minus lowest total?
Compute the nonnegative difference between the largest and smallest section totals.
section_total_except_named: In section {target_section}, what is the sum of all printed metric values except {excluded_labels}?
Add every value in section {target_section}, but exclude {excluded_labels}. What is the total?
What is the total for section {target_section} after removing the values for {excluded_labels}?
Within section {target_section}, skip {excluded_labels} and sum the remaining metric values.
section_ranked_total_label: After summing the printed values in each section, which section has the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} total?
Sum each section's metric cards. What section is {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} by total?
Which section ranks {rank_ordinal} when the section totals are ordered from {rank_order_phrase}?
Using the total of each section, identify the section with the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} total.
What is the section label for the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} section total?
nth_highest_metric_label: Which metric card has the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed value?
Order all metric-card values from {rank_order_phrase}. What card label is {rank_ordinal}?
Across the whole infographic, which metric label is {rank_ordinal} when values are sorted from {rank_order_phrase}?
Using every metric card, identify the label with the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} value.
What is the card label for the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed metric value?
nth_lowest_metric_label: Which metric card has the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed value?
Order all metric-card values from {rank_order_phrase}. What card label is {rank_ordinal}?
Across the whole infographic, which metric label is {rank_ordinal} when values are sorted from {rank_order_phrase}?
Using every metric card, identify the label with the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} value.
What is the card label for the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed metric value?
nth_highest_metric_in_section_label: In section {target_section}, which metric card has the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed value?
Within section {target_section}, order the metric-card values from {rank_order_phrase}. What card label is {rank_ordinal}?
Looking only at section {target_section}, which metric label is {rank_ordinal} when values are sorted from {rank_order_phrase}?
Using the cards in section {target_section}, identify the label with the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} value.
What is the metric-card label for the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed value in section {target_section}?
nth_lowest_metric_in_section_label: In section {target_section}, which metric card has the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed value?
Within section {target_section}, order the metric-card values from {rank_order_phrase}. What card label is {rank_ordinal}?
Looking only at section {target_section}, which metric label is {rank_ordinal} when values are sorted from {rank_order_phrase}?
Using the cards in section {target_section}, identify the label with the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} value.
What is the metric-card label for the {rank_ordinal} {rank_direction} printed value in section {target_section}?
section_icon_total_value: In section {target_section}, what is the sum of the values on cards using the {filter_icon_kind} icon?
Look only at section {target_section}. Add the values for cards marked with the {filter_icon_kind} icon.
What total do you get from the {filter_icon_kind}-icon cards in section {target_section}?
Within section {target_section}, sum every printed value whose card uses the {filter_icon_kind} icon.
Using the {filter_icon_kind} icon as the filter, what is the total in section {target_section}?
section_icon_total_difference_value: For cards with the {comparison_icon_kind} icon, what is the absolute difference between the total in section {target_section_a} and the total in section {target_section_b}?
Compare sections {target_section_a} and {target_section_b}. For the {comparison_icon_kind}-icon cards, what is the difference between their section totals?
Add the {comparison_icon_kind}-icon cards in section {target_section_a} and in section {target_section_b}. What is the nonnegative difference?
Using only cards marked with the {comparison_icon_kind} icon, compute the absolute total gap between {target_section_a} and {target_section_b}.
What is the absolute difference between the {comparison_icon_kind}-icon total in {target_section_a} and the {comparison_icon_kind}-icon total in {target_section_b}?
section_icon_extremum_label: Using only cards with the {comparison_icon_kind} icon, which section has the {rank_direction} total?
Filter to the {comparison_icon_kind}-icon cards. Which section has the {rank_direction} sum?
After summing {comparison_icon_kind}-icon cards within each section, what section has the {rank_direction} total?
Which section label has the {rank_direction} total among cards marked with the {comparison_icon_kind} icon?
Compare section totals using only {comparison_icon_kind}-icon cards. Which section is {rank_direction}?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

query:sum_named_metrics.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes for the supporting metric cards

query:section_extrema_arithmetic.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "section_a_extremum" and "section_b_extremum", each mapped to the supporting metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box

query:section_total_extrema_difference.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "highest_total_section" and "lowest_total_section", each mapped to a list of supporting metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes

query:section_total_except_named.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes for the included metric cards after exclusions

query:section_ranked_total_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible section label requested by the question
query:section_ranked_total_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes for the metric cards in the selected section

query:nth_highest_metric_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible metric-card label requested by the question
query:nth_highest_metric_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the selected metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box

query:nth_lowest_metric_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible metric-card label requested by the question
query:nth_lowest_metric_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the selected metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box

query:nth_highest_metric_in_section_labe.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible metric-card label requested by the question
query:nth_highest_metric_in_section_labe.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the selected metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box

query:nth_lowest_metric_in_section_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible metric-card label requested by the question
query:nth_lowest_metric_in_section_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the selected metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box

query:section_icon_total_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes for the matching icon-filtered metric cards

query:section_icon_total_difference_valu.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "section_a_filtered_icon_cards" and "section_b_filtered_icon_cards", each mapped to a list of matching metric card [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes

query:section_icon_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible section label requested by the question
query:section_icon_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the answer section panel [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box
